what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets image asset: an icon named Users6, identified at image://design-assets/icons/Users6, with metadata, blob reference, versioning, and provenance.
observations: The asset is an image/png but has width 0 and height 0.
It has a single version (v1) with an empty alt field.
The source is listed as 'dragnet' and the author session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'.
The body after the YAML frontmatter is empty.
standouts: Zero width/height for an image asset.
Empty alt text on a visual icon.
Single-version record with no linked relationships.
concerns: Width and height of 0 may indicate incomplete ingestion or a missing image analysis step.
Empty alt text reduces accessibility and discoverability.
No links or usage context are provided, making the asset's role unclear from this file alone.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata.
References the binary asset via a blob:// URI.
Includes created/updated timestamps and author session provenance.
notes: A catalog entry for a Users6 icon in the design-assets channel, but its zero dimensions and empty alt suggest the metadata may be incomplete.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0x0?
Where is the actual pixel data stored and is it reachable through the blob reference?
What UI or component is meant to use this icon?
Why is the alt text empty?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a versioned icon asset; it does record the asset but lacks expected image dimensions and descriptive alt text.
intention_signals: It seems to be registering the Users6 icon as a discoverable, versioned design asset within a channel-based memory system.
contribution: Provides an addressable, versioned metadata record for the Users6 icon, including a blob pointer, MIME type, source, author session, and timestamps that a fused system can use for asset retrieval and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger record for a design-assets PNG icon named Users6 with a blob reference, version 1 metadata, zero dimensions, empty alt text, and dragnet ingestion provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version the Users6 icon in the design-assets channel for later retrieval, reference, and design-system governance.
